title: leea smithii
intro: Leea smithii, also known as the Leea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Leea smithii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and act as an anti-oxidant, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health conditions. Leea smithii is commonly prepared into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
